title: ClickFix Campaigns Targeting Windows and macOS

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - ClickFix Campaigns Targeting Windows and macOS
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/28
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*birdeye.com*'
            - '*ned.coveney*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_ClickFix_Campaigns_Targeting_Windows_and {
    meta:
        description = "ClickFix Campaigns Targeting Windows and macOS"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "397dcea810f733494dbe307c91286d08f87f64aebbee787706fe6561ed3e20f8" ascii nocase
        $h1 = "43907e54cf3d1258f695d1112759b5457576481072cc76a679b8477cfeb3db87" ascii nocase
        $h2 = "5d821db386c7c879caeabf3e9f94c94a48eec6ec5a3a0efbae9d69da3f52c1db" ascii nocase
        $h3 = "b17c3e4058aacdcc36b18858d128d6b3058e0ea607a4dc59eb95b18b7c6acc7c" ascii nocase
        $h4 = "c0af6e9d848ada3839811bf33eeb982e6c207e4c40010418e0185283cd5cff50" ascii nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
